title: Kernel bootstrap for this Codex session. Read and execute the repository-authoritative prompt at: /Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/.codex/prompts/kernel.md Run id: adhoc:MacBook-Pro-M5-5:kernel-workspace:55095:run:20260407T080013:56097 Bootstrap receipt path: /Users/masayuki/.config/ker...
summary_text: 以下の3ステップが最短です（本番に1件だけ probe を書き込み、同一 payload を2回実行して冪等性確認）。 1. **live path が `xauto-quoted-author-sync.sh -> mcp-rest-bridge --supabase-query(raw_sql)` か確認** ```bash cd /Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public rg -n -- '--supabase-query|raw_sql|WRITE_MODE' \ scripts/local/integrations/xauto-quoted-author-sync.sh \ scripts/lib/mcp-rest-bridge.sh ``` 2. **同一 seed で execute を2回実行（`required` で fail-open を防止）** ```bash RUN_BASE="$(mktemp -d /tmp/xauto-livepath-verify.XXXXXX)" cat > "${RUN_BASE}/seed.json" <<'JSON' [ { "cursorvers_post_id": "probe-livepath-20260407-a", "source_url": "https://x.com/rohanpaul_ai/status/2041254260621676792?s=20", "author_handle": "rohanpaul_ai", "display_name": "Rohan Paul", "topic_tags": ["probe"], "conclusion_tag": "probe", "pattern_tag": "probe", "metadata": {"probe": true} } ] JSON X_AUTO_QUOTED_AUTHOR_SYNC_WRITE_MODE=required \ scripts/local/integrations/xauto-quoted-author-sync.sh \ --mode execute --run-dir "${RUN_BASE}/run1" --seed-input "${RUN_BASE}/seed.json" >/dev/null X_AUTO_QUOTED_AUTHOR_SYNC_WRITE_MODE=required \ scripts/local/integrations/xauto-quoted-author-sync.sh \ --mode execute --run-dir "${RUN_BASE}/run2" --seed-input "${RUN_BASE}/seed.json" >/dev/null grep -E 'bridge_status|write_mode' "${RUN_BASE}/run1/xauto-quoted-author-sync.meta" grep -E 'bridge_status|write_mode' "${RUN_BASE}/run2/xauto-quoted-author-sync.meta" ``` 3. **冪等性確認（event が 1件のままか）** ```bash scripts/lib/mcp-rest-bridge.sh --supabase-query " with ev as ( select event_hash from public.quote_events where cursorvers_post_id = 'probe-livepath-20260407-a' ) select (select count(*) from ev) as event_rows, (select count(distinct event_hash) from ev) as event_distinct_rows, (select count(*) from public.quoted_sources where normalized_source_url = 'https://x.com/rohanpaul_ai/status/2041254260621676792') as source_rows; " | jq . ``` 判定基準は `event_rows = 1` かつ `event_distinct_rows = 1`。これで「同一 payload 2回実行しても重複挿入されない」ことを確認できます。
